memories: The user's mother's name is Diane.
User practices ukulele every evening, focusing on folk songs rather than their childhood love of Sinatra standards.
The user's mother's favorite drink is unsweetened iced tea.
The user is currently learning to play the ukulele.
A cherished memory for the user is learning to bake their mother's famous apple pie recipe with her.
The user considers their mother, Diane, to be their best friend.
The user's mother loves gardening and is particularly proud of her rose bushes.
User backpacked through New Zealand last spring, hiking alpine trails by day and relaxing to electronic music in hostels by night.
The user is afraid of heights.
query: My mom's birthday is coming up and I have to give a speech. Can you draft a short, heartfelt toast for me to give at her party?
